name: particle-academy/fancy-mlm
description: Framework-agnostic multi-level referral / network-marketing engine for agentic apps. Pure PHP core with an optional Laravel 11-13 bridge and fun-lab / catalog / fms integration.

suggest.illuminate/support: Only needed when using the optional Laravel service provider, facade, models, and fun-lab listener. Compatible with 11.x through 13.x. The core FancyMlm engine requires zero framework.
suggest.particle-academy/laravel-fun-lab: Enables the gamified referral loop — award upline members when a referral acts.
suggest.particle-academy/laravel-catalog: Anchors monetary commissions to real catalog sales (Cashier webhooks + Stripe metadata).
suggest.particle-academy/laravel-fms: Models referral tiers as feature groups and scales bonus caps via resource-feature limits.
